$comment: This file is generated via firehose. DO NOT edit by hand. Make any changes required using the firehose repo instead.
title: metadataGlonassEphemeris
description: GLONASS Ephemeris describing GLONASS satellite locations.  Definitions and usage are covered in GLONASS ICD L1,L2 - Edition 5.1 2008, Section 4.4.

timeOfValidity.description: time_of_validity: Time at which the measurement is considered to be valid.

freqO.description: freq_o: Frequency channel offset number in range from 0 to 20.

nT.description: n_t: Calender number of day within 4 year interval starting at Jan 1 of a leap year  Units: days

tK.description: t_k: Time referenced to the beginning of the frame within the current day.  Units: s

tB.description: t_b: Index of time interval within current day according to UTC(SU) + 03 hrs.  Units: minutes

gammaN.description: gamma_n: Relative Satellite frequency bias  Units: s/s

tauN.description: tau_n: Satellite clock bias.  Units: s

svPosX.description: sv_pos_x: Satellite X position in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km

svVelX.description: sv_vel_x: Satellite X velocity in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s

svAccelX.description: sv_accel_x: Satellite X acceleration in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s^2

svPosY.description: sv_pos_y: Satellite Y position in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km

svVelY.description: sv_vel_y: Satellite Y velocity in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s

svAccelY.description: sv_accel_y: Satellite Y acceleration in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s^2

svPosZ.description: sv_pos_z: Satellite Z position in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km

svVelZ.description: sv_vel_z: Satellite Z velocity in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s

svAccelZ.description: sv_accel_z: Satellite Z acceleration in PZ-90 coordinate system at time t_b.  Units: km/s^2
